turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, uh, I need some help.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for calling Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic, Pune. How may I assist you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I'm calling regarding doctor availability specific.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry, I can't access that information.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can't help with that, let me connect you to our staff.
